settings.text: Optimize your shipping costs with AI-powered 3D bin packing. Offer accurate real-time rates from major carriers and streamline your fulfillment workflow.

settings.title: AI 3D Bin Packing
settings.text: Our advanced algorithm automatically fits order items into your boxes in 3D. Use the right size every time and avoid oversized shipping costs.

settings.text: Show real-time rates from UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post directly at checkout.

settings.text: Manage your custom box dimensions and weight limits for perfect rate accuracy.

settings.title: Workflow Sync
settings.text: Review orders, see packed boxes, and purchase labels without ever leaving the Shopify admin.

settings.title: Live Carrier Rates
settings.text: Stop guessing which box to use. DimenAI's AI engine calculates the most efficient packing strategy in milliseconds, saving you up to 30% on shipping costs.

settings.title: Optimized 3D Packing
settings.text: Provide transparency to your customers with accurate, live shipping rates. No more undercharging or overcharging—just fair, real-time pricing from global carriers.

settings.title: Multi-Carrier Dashboard
settings.text: Connect and manage all your shipping carriers in one centralized dashboard. Track performance, sync rates, and streamline your entire shipping operation.

settings.title: Smart Package Management
settings.text: Pre-configure standard carrier boxes or add your own custom packaging. DimenAI uses these dimensions to ensure the most accurate shipping rates at checkout.

settings.text: Eliminate rate discrepancies with precise dimensional weight calculations.
